site.name: Trolley Scout
site.description: Grocery deals and money help for South Africans.

skills.name: find-grocery-deals
skills.description: Find this week's verified South African grocery specials, the cheapest store for a list, nearby supermarket specials, and flash/daily deals. No auth.

skills.name: money-help
skills.description: Give South Africans accurate, current SASSA social grant amounts and free money help (school-fee exemptions, free basic electricity, zero-rated foods).
